---
name: Mod request
about: Suggest a mod for inclusion
title: "[REQUEST]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: midnightdoggo19

---

**Why should the mod be added?**
Explain why this would be a worthwhile addition.

**Who would use this?**
This isn't about playstyles-- I try to only incorporate mods that change something for everyone, not optimise your game for you. Is/are the mod(s) multiplayer-compatible?

**Details!**
Provide a link to the project(s) and a specific version of the mod. Only Fabric mods from Modrinth are supported.
